# WP_Discovery Protocol

> An open agent-readiness and AI-discovery layer for WordPress: one machine-readable document at /.well-known/discovery.json that declares a site's identity, capabilities, and APIs to AI agents and crawlers — without prior knowledge of which plugins are installed.

WP_Discovery covers the descriptive layer (identity, llms.txt, Schema.org) and extends it into the operational layer (capabilities, APIs, A2A agent cards, MCP-shaped tools). It is built on converging conventions (.well-known, A2A, MCP), is openly licensed (CC BY 4.0), and ships with a reference implementation. It relates to the Open Agent Readiness Standard (OARS): OARS centers on the descriptive layer; WP_Discovery covers that and adds the operational layer.

## Specification
- [Specification](https://github.com/heera/wp-discovery-protocol/blob/main/SPECIFICATION.md): master document and table of contents
- [Discovery Model](https://github.com/heera/wp-discovery-protocol/blob/main/spec/02-discovery-model.md): the document, field by field
- [Consumer Contract](https://github.com/heera/wp-discovery-protocol/blob/main/spec/07-consumer-contract.md): what a cooperative agent must do — read only the declared scope
- [Conformance](https://github.com/heera/wp-discovery-protocol/blob/main/spec/08-conformance.md): the MUST / SHOULD / MAY checklist

## Machine artifacts
- [JSON Schema, wire-format 1.0](https://heera.github.io/wp-discovery-protocol/schemas/discovery/1.0/discovery.schema.json): the canonical, citable schema
- [Example discovery.json](https://github.com/heera/wp-discovery-protocol/blob/main/examples/discovery.json): a complete, valid document

## Implementation
- [Agentimus](https://github.com/heera/agentimus): the reference WordPress plugin that produces a discovery.json
